segments: Calvin : Hey Dave! Nice to meet you! How ' s it going since we talked? Dave : Hey Calvin! Nice to meet you too! Things been going well since we last talked. attended this awesome event recently. like a car lover ' s paradise! had many classic cars on show, I was in awe. had opportunity to speak with owners hear their fascinating stories. super inspiring. What about you? Anything exciting happening in your life lately? Calvin : That event sounds great! Something really exciting happened to me - had big life change! Here ' s my new mansion - cool? Dave : Wow! Congrats on big change! What inspired you to start this journey? Calvin : excited to learn about Japanese culture to expand. Dave : Calvin learning about new cultures is awesome! Have you ever been to Japan? Calvin : Never been there before. Fascinated by traditions can ' t wait to get taste of culture. Dave :, Japan sounds amazing. Can ' t wait to hear all about it! When are you leaving? Calvin : I ' m heading there next month. ll be staying in nice place while I ' m there. Dave : looks cozy! Where ' find a place to stay there? Calvin : agent found me this awesome place, thankful! Dave : Awesome! Having place to stay is key. your plans for trip? Calvin : planning to explore city try out different local cuisines collaborate with musicians in area. Dave : Sounds great! Collaborating with local musicians amazing experience. How long planning to stay in Japan? Calvin : gonna be in Japan for a few months then off to Boston! can ' t wait! Dave : great ' t wait for you to return from your trip. been spending lots of time at this beautiful park lately - so calming. Have you been there before? Calvin : No, never been in that park. Looks like a chill spot.I ' ll check it out when I ' m back. Appreciate the tip! Dave : Cool! Enjoy your trip! know if need any more recommendations. Have fun! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! If need any help ll sure to let you know. Stay safe

Calvin : Hey Dave, been a few days, wanted to let you in on cool news. got new car ' s amazing! owning a luxury car was a dream come true I ' m stoked. Dave : Woohoo, Calvin! Congrats on new car! How ' s it driving? Calvin : Nice car! amazing ride - super smooth real powerful. Like a rockstar behind the wheel! Thanks, man! Dave : Wow, Calvin! Owning something like this must feel amazing. your first one? Show me a pic! What ' s it called? Calvin : Woohoo! finally got myself this beauty. ' s a pic from yesterday when took it for a ride. Can ' t believe I ' m actually driving it. what I deserve after hard work. Every time step in like adrenaline rush! Dave : Calvin, car looks awesome! must feel amazing every time get inside! deserved it - congrats buddy! Calvin : Woah m on cloud nine! Hard work pays off. What ' s up with you, Dave? Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Doing good. Last weekend went to music festival in Boston awesome! many cool bands playing atmosphere was electric. love music, reminded me why I love it. Here ' s a pic, take a look. Calvin : Wow, sounds like a blast! Which one was your favorite? Dave : Wow many great bands! If to pick a favorite be Aerosmith. Their performance was incredible. ll show you a pic I took when they playing. Calvin : Cool! Lovin ' Aerosmith. Dave : finally saw them live amazing experience! jamming out to one of their hits. Check out epic picture of them! Calvin : Cool, Dave! favorite singers live must have been wild! chance to hang out with them after the show? Dave : Nah didn ' t get to hang with them after show seeing them live was cool enough.always a dream to see your favorites performing! Calvin : Yeah always a dream to see your favorites doing their thing! glad you got to experience that. Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Yeah incredible experience. anything new happening in your life? Calvin : Got new ride wrote new tunes - had few studio sessions last week excited to collaborate. Can ' t wait to share it with everyone! Dave : Cool, Calvin! Looking forward to hearing new tunes. Keep me updated on how collaborations go! Calvin : Yeah no worries! let you know how it goes. Cheers! Dave : Enjoy collaborations, Calvin! Stay safe! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Gonna have fun and stay safe with it. Bye

Calvin : Hey Dave! Long time no see. went to awesome music thingy in Tokyo - cool! Dave : Hey Calvin! Great to hear from you. How was the music thingy in Tokyo? See any cool bands? Calvin : Hey Dave! The festival in Tokyo was awesome! Didn ' t see any bands, but met lots of talented artists and industry people. Totally enriching! Dave : Wow, Calvin, sounds great! What did you learn from it? Calvin : learned a lot got great advice from professionals in music industry. was inspiring! Dave : Wow, Calvin! Bet inspiring being surrounded by professionals. get any advice from them? Calvin : producer gave me advice to stay true to myself and sound unique. got me thinking about where I want my music to go. ' s really motivating! Dave : Wow, Calvin! motivating to see you staying true to yourself. got thinking, where do see your music taking you? Calvin : Thanks, Dave! dreaming of touring the world, performing for different people connecting with them. hope my music can reach global audience make impact. looking forward to upcoming trip to Boston after finish the Frank Ocean tour. heard music scene there is awesome, can ' t wait to check it out! Dave : Sounds like amazing plan, Cal! can ' t wait for your trip to Boston. ll show you around town cool spots. music scene there is awesome, with places like Paradise Rock, House of Blues, and Fenway Park. have great performances there. Count me in for front row when up onstage! by way, check out this pic. Calvin : Wow, Boston looks great! Thanks for the tips., awesome pic! Dave : Last weekend went to a car show. Classic cars charming dedication people put into restoring them is amazing. ' s into auto engineering.Can ' t wait to show you some when come to Boston! almost forgot to send a photo, look at this beautiful car! Calvin : Wow, Dave, car looks great! Take look at my car, put a lot of work into it. Can ' t wait to see more when ' m in Boston! Dave : Thanks! took a lot of work. had chance to check out Boston apart from gigs? Calvin : Not yet, been busy with rehearsals traveling. looking forward to exploring city trying out delicious food visiting popular attractions. Maybe can grab a bite together when I m there? Dave :, Cal! Let grab some food show you favorite spots in city. Can ' t wait to show them to you! Calvin : Sounds great, Dave! Can ' t wait to try out food there with you. It ' ll be fun! Dave : It ' ll be great, Cal! Can ' t wait to show you amazing music and food here. See you soon

Dave : Hey Calvin, long time no see! A lot ' s been happening since we last talked. Guess what? I finally opened my own car maintenance shop! s satisfying to have a spot to work on cars - ' s like a dream come true! Take look at the photo. Calvin : Wow Dave! Congrats on opening your own car maintenance shop! looks like all your hard work and dedication paid off. Dave : Thanks, Cal! great to see my hard work paying off. Opening this shop was my dream, happy to see it getting started. was lot of hard work, but worth it. Calvin : Woo, Dave! Congrats on achieving your dream - got guts and ambition - awesome! Keep it up! Dave : Thanks! Appreciate support. My dream was to open a shop step towards my other dream of working on classic cars. love their design and engineering. Calvin : Wow, Dave! Going for it with classic cars is cool! Fulfilling your dreams important. Dave : obsessed with classic cars. have unique charm. thrilled to restore one last year nothing like bringing it back to life! Take look at engine of restored car. Calvin : Wow, Dave! That looks awesome! Dave : Thanks, Calvin! labor of love. Challenging, but so worth it. Calvin : s awesome when see something you worked on come to life. Dave : Yeah! feels great to see hard work pay off, like bringing something back to life. Calvin : amazing feeling when you create something and resonates with people. satisfying when finish something you made from scratch! Dave : Yeah, Calvin! amazing feeling to see something you create become a reality. Knowing your skills and hard work made it happen is incredible. Calvin : Yeah, Dave! Feels good when our hard work pays off. perfect blend of dedication and passion! Dave : that mix keeps me motivated and makes it all worthwhile.Calvin : Keep going for it! Dave : I will! By This a photo of my shop. Come by sometime, can! Calvin : your shop looks great! love to check it out sometime. What sort cars you work on at your shop? Dave : Thanks, Calvin! I work on all kinds cars at the shop - from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars. It keeps me busy and happy! Calvin : Wow Dave, working on cars must be rewarding. Dave : working on cars is I m passionate about. Doing it every day is rewarding! Seeing transformation is awesome knowing helping people keep cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin : Wow Dave, awesome! Doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Keep up great work! Dave : Thanks, Cal! appreciate the boost. means lot my work is valued brings joy to others. Calvin : Glad to help, Dave! awesome to see you doing your thing making a difference. Your hard work and talent deserve all recognition. Keep on keepin ' on, bud! look at this beautiful necklace with a diamond pendant, stunning! Dave : a great necklace! Where did you get it? Calvin : Thanks, Dave! got it from another artist as a gift - great reminder of why I keep hustling as a musician! Dave : Awesome, Calvin! Keep pushing making music, remind us why we keep hustling. Calvin : Yeah, Dave! The road can be hard, but when we remember why we ' re doing it, it keeps us going. ' s keep each other motivated

Dave : Hey Calvin! Long time no talk. How ' s it going? Crazy news - I ' m teaming up with local garage. Take look at what we working on together! Calvin : Hey Dave, great to hear from you! ' s awesome news about teaming up with local garage. Super inspiring seeing you follow your passion. Congratulations on this new venture. ' s impressive how far you ' ve come since we last chatted. How ' s everything going? Dave : Thanks, Calvin! I ' m loving this job. get to work with awesome mechanics share my knowledge about cars. Here ' s what I ' m currently working on! cool project, even if challenging. Calvin : car looks awesome! putting in a lot of effort great to see end result. Keep up good work. Got any plans for what ' s next? Dave : Thanks Calvin! Appreciate support. keep learning more about auto engineering maybe build custom car from scratch someday - s dream! For now keep working on this project assisting customers. Calvin : Wow, Dave! so inspiring - good for you for pushing yourself to achieve your dream. Making custom car sounds awesome. Don ' t forget to relax and enjoy the process too! Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Gotta take time to chill. any hobbies that help you relax? Calvin : Hey Dave, long drives in [ this car ] help me relax. feeling of wind and open road freeing. helps me clear my head. What like to to chill out? Dave : Yeah, I hear you! Driving with wind in your hair calming. Taking a walk around is great way to destress,. Exploring, taking in sights and sounds - peaceful experience. Calvin :, I totally hear ya. Embracing nature calming for me too. been loving getting to know Japanese culture.stuck with my music at moment, like my creativity ' s frozen. Any tips? Dave : If having trouble coming up with ideas usually immerse myself in something I love, like concerts or favorite albums. usually helps to jumpstart my inspiration. Maybe try taking break from music explore other things. Plus have fun while you ' re at it! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Taking break great for getting my mojo back. ll take your advice and explore. Appreciate help! You ' re awesome! Dave : No worries, Calvin! Glad I could help. Keep pursuing your music never give up. You ' re awesome! Calvin : Thanks, appreciate it. Won ' t give up. Let stay in touch! Bye! Dave : Sure, Calvin! Keep in touch. If need help, let me know. Bye

Calvin : Hey Dave! Long time no chat! Lots gone down since we last caught up. Dave : Hey Calvin! Long time no chat! How ' s everything been going since last caught up? Calvin : Hey Dave, not everything going smoothly. had an incident last week where my place got flooded, but thankfully, managed to save music gear and favorite microphone. ' s been tough, but staying positive looking forward to getting everything fixed up. Dave : Man, ' s rough, Calvin. Sorry to hear about that. glad you could save your music gear and mic - important things. Stay positive, pal. Anything I can do to help? Calvin : Thanks, Dave. Appreciate support. Waiting on insurance to kick in can start repairs - fingers crossed won ' t take too long. look at my creative haven, pour my heart into music. Dave : studio looks awesome, Cal! hope you get it fixed soon continue creating music. Hang in there! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Can ' t wait to get back to making music. Anything exciting re working on these days? Dave : excited, opened my car shop last week! Invited friends over to celebrate amazing. Super stoked to share passion help out with folks ' rides. been incredible so far. Calvin : Way to go, Dave! Congrats on opening your own car shop! excitement is contagious. Keep up great work! Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Your support greatly appreciated. quite a journey so far excited to see future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening in world of music for you? Calvin : Thanks Dave! Super excited for upcoming performance in Tokyo this month. great to show my music to new crowd hopefully expand my following! Dave : Cool, Cal! Doing a show in Tokyo, wow! sure audience is gonna love it. Wishing you all the luck! Let me know how it goesCalvin : Sure thing, Dave! keep you posted on how it goes. Thanks for good luck! Look what wonderful night! Dave : That looks great! Where did you snap that pic? Calvin : took pic in Tokyo last night. skyline stunning! Dave : Wow, great shot! night skyline pops with city lights. take a trip there soon! Calvin : Thanks Dave! city lights there amazing. should visit, it ' s awesome! Dave : adding it to my list. Thanks

Calvin : Hey Dave! Been ages since we chatted. So much gone down. Touring with Frank Ocean last week was wild. Tokyo was unreal - - crowd was insane. I felt alive when performing, can ' t find words to express it. Dave : Wow, ' s awesome, Cal! bet incredible experience. Congrats! Look what I ' ve been up to recently, ' s my neighbor ' s car. He s been having trouble with engine, but now it ' s done by myself! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! amazing experience - energy and love from fans was crazy. car in the pic? ' s one fixing up engine for a friend? Working on cars helps me chill clear my head. Dave : Yes, Cal! not difficult for me to help neighbors with their cars. Working on cars is therapeutic. Does it relax you as much as it does me? Calvin : Yeah, totally! Fixing cars calms me down gives me real sense of achievement - like meditating. any hobbies give same satisfaction? Dave : passionate about fixing up things. s more than just a hobby - gives me sense of achievement and purpose. get real buzz transforming something not working into something that runs smoothly - like giving it second chance. Calvin : inspiring, Dave. find purpose in transforming things like when you create something new or collaborate with others. We both making something great out of nothing, s amazing, right? Dave : Yeah Cal, s cool how we can take something and make it look amazing. Giving it new life makes me feel powerful and happy - like achieved something. Calvin : Yeah, Dave! feeling of power and happiness amazing! great to see what we created with all our hard work and ideas. Dave : Yeah, Calvin! Accomplishment keeps me motivated. mentioned Tokyo lit you upalways enjoy performing live? Calvin : Performing live always fuels my soul! love rush connection with crowd feeling ' s indescribable it ' s absolute high! Dave : it feels awesome. connection between artist and audience must be powerful. Look at atmosphere in this photo s just off the charts! Calvin : Yeah, Dave! feeling is amazing. Everyone part of it like one big harmony. Dave : ' s awesome! Music brings people together creates great atmosphere. s like therapy for us all. what ' s next for your music? Calvin : Cool can ' t wait for tour with Frank! buzzing to perform in Boston see what it ' s like. Gonna be great playing for folks from home. What think of music scene there? Dave : Hey Boston ' s music scene is awesome! Tons of talented musicians cool places to play. ' ll be a blast performing there - be there to cheer you on! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Your support means a lot to me. Can ' t wait to experience music scene there. Dave : Great, Calvin! Have great time in Boston. Can ' t wait to hear all about it when you get back! Calvin : Thanks! ll fill you in on all details when I get back. See you soon

Calvin : Hey Dave! Met with creative team for my album yesterday. long session, awesome to see everything coming together. Dave : Hey Cal! Sounds great your album ' s coming along. you feeling good about it? Here ' s a pic I took. Calvin : Dave, thanks for checking in. feeling stoked about this album! been making magic with a team in studio, working on music and everything. Look at what a wonderful studio we have! How have you been? Anything new since we talked? Dave : Hey, nice photo of studio! Working in a team yields incredible results, well done! Keep pushing it! been doing good - thanks for asking. exploring parks on weekends to relax - peaceful surrounded by nature. any chill spots you enjoy in Boston? Calvin : Thanks! studio is great for creativity. never been to Boston before, but hear parks are amazing. Can ' t wait to visit next month. Anything cool remember about Boston parks? Dave : That sounds great! Boston parks are awesome, especially in spring. s so serene when re walking around. went for a stroll last Friday amazing. magical - you ' ll love it! love taking walks on weekends, they recharge me for entire upcoming week! Calvin : excited to experience that serenity. can ' t wait to take walk in parks and recharge. been on any hikes lately? Dave : Nah, haven ' t gone hiking recently, but s awesome - being in nature pushing yourself to new heights. Clears your mind brings sense of calm. you been to the mountains before? Heard they ' re super chill. Calvin : Nah, haven ' t been to the mountains but keen to go. Looking for way to escape it all and de - stress. want to go on a hike to a place similar to this.What ' s new exciting happening for you, Dave? Dave : booked trip to mountainous region for next month! Finally gonna to see majestic peaks! amazing experience! Calvin : Cool, Dave! Have great time. sure amazing experience. Take lots of pics show me when you get back. Dave : Yep, Calvin! Gonna take lots of pics. Can ' t wait to show you when I get back! Calvin : Have fun exploring the mountains, Dave! Safe travels see you soon. Take care! Dave : Thanks, Calvin! Take care, see you soon

Calvin : Hi Dave! Nice to hear from you. Since last chat, some things happened. had a lil car accident last Friday, upsetting but no one hurt. been dealing with insurance and repairs - taking up time and energy. Look at this photo! Dave : Sorry to hear about car accident, Calvin. glad to hear nobody was hurt. Dealing with insurance and repairs can be time - consuming and draining. encountered any issues in insurance process? Calvin : Hey Dave, thanks for checking in! insurance process was a hassle - took forever ton of paperwork. ' s all sorted now, getting it fixed up. Can ' t wait to drive it again! Dave : How long did it take to get everything sorted out? glad it ' s all taken care of now! Calvin : only took a week to sort everything out. worried about cost, wasn ' t too bad. Look at this photo from auto repair shop. Dave : Cool! Glad wasn ' t too expensive. Who are him? Calvin : That ' s mechanic. knows the stuff doing his best to get my car running again. Dave : great to hear! Skilled knowledgeable people working on your car - feeling confident? Calvin : Feeling more confident excited to show off my car! Trusting their expertise. Dave : Great, Cal! awesome when trust people fixing it. Sounds like they doing great job. ll be back to normal soon! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Excited to drive again. Appreciate your help! Look what wonderful view from living room! Dave : Wow amazing view! Where is it? haven ' t seen anything like that before! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! ' s from a small town in Japanview of the mountains unbelievably stunning! Dave : Wow! get to that place yet? Calvin : Nope, not yet! haven ' t been there before ' s on my to - do list for after tour with Frank Ocean ends. Can ' t wait to see them in person! Look at snowy peak. Dave : Looks awesome! ever tried skiing before? looks like loads of fun! Calvin : Haven ' t tried it before, look like a lot of fun! might give it a try once. what ' s up with you anything new in daily routine? Dave : Yes, Cal! recently joined rock band practicing guitar. Look at this photo it ' s us, the guys! Calvin : Playing guitar in rock band awesome, Dave! bring lot of emotions. Dave : Sounds good, Calvin! Good company great music lift mood bring positive emotions! have to go now. ' ll see you soon! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! let ' s keep in touch, take care

Dave : Hey Calvin, how ' s car doing after crash? You stoked to get back on road, right? Calvin : Hey Dave! Thanks for checking in. It ' s all good now, car ' s fixed and going strong. Nothing better than cruising around - it ' s best! Look at how my car looks right now. How ' ve you been? Anything new? Dave : Glad to hear your car ' s fixed and going strong! ' been good too. been hanging out with friends at parks lately. arranged with friends for regular walks together in park. Calvin : sounds like great plan! Regular walks with friends can be wonderful way to spend time together stay active. Fresh air and buddies can do wonders. favorite spot for hanging out? Dave : Yeah, today we going to that spot. Look at lovely photo. Calvin : Wow what a view! sunset over river is gorgeous. must be tranquil there. Reminds me of living in my Japanese mansion with epic cityscape. s like a dream come true! Look at this photo took from my backyard of mansion. s beautiful! Dave : peace by river is nice. But living in Japanese mansion surrounded by city skyline must be stunning. views must be amazing! Calvin : beautiful. look out windows see city lights awe - inspiring. Luxury and beauty on new level. Look at front part of mansion. Dave : mansion looks great! view from inside is stunning. Must be amazing living there. Anything else looking forward to doing in Japan? Calvin : Thanks Dave! Japan is indeed amazing. Can ' t wait to try food check out culture. Have you ever been there? Dave : Nope, never been to Japan but keen to go one day. heard it ' s full of vibes, good eats and awesome tech.Plus to experience culture amazing - hooked on their music! Calvin : Japan has it all - vibes, food, tech, amazing culture. s like stepping into another world. been working on cool music collaborations with Japanese artists excited to hear how it turns out! Dave : Cool, Cal! Working with them great chance - can ' t wait for tunes! Calvin : Thanks! ll share clips when everything ' s ready. Collaborating with various artists always exciting, chance to create something unique. Dave : Way to go, Cal! Collaborating with different artists to create special sounds amazing. Can ' t wait to see / hear end product! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Appreciate all help. It ' s gonna be awesome - can ' t wait to show you. Great catching up, gotta get back to work now. Take care! Dave : Hey Cal, take care don ' t overwork yourself! Talk to you soon. Stay safe

Dave : Hey Cal, been ages since we spoke! Guess what? got back from a road trip with friends - saw stunning countryside. lovely break from corporate mayhem. Driving on winding roads, taking in views, chatting with friends recharged me totally - reminds me why I love cars so much. What did you end up doing? Calvin : Hey Dave! Great hearing from you!, a road trip sounds awesome. felt great to get away from work and relax on twisty roads. Recharging with your passion is awesome! Dave : great to get away reconnect with my passion. Reminded me why I ' m passionate about what I do. Makes long hours worth it. Here ' s a pic what wonderful place we found. had any recent moments made you remember what you love? Calvin : happy for you you have found such amazing place! working on this project to transform a Japanese mansion into recording studio. my dream to have space for creating music with other artists. s my sanctuary that reminds me why I love music. ' s pic of progress I made. Dave : Wow, Calvin, this looks amazing! You ' ve made so much progress. Must be fulfilling to have your own space. What kind of music have you been creating in there? Calvin : Thanks, Dave! feels great having my own space to work in. been experimenting with different genres lately pushing myself out of comfort zone. Adding electronic elements to songs gives fresh vibe. exciting process of self - discovery and growth! Dave : Wow, Calvin, great! must be exciting process of self - discovery and growth to experiment with different genres. Does moving between styles present challenges? Calvin : switching it up can be tough, but matter of finding right balance between sticking to my sound and trying new stuff.can be intimidating, but ' s makes it exciting keeps me motivated to keep going! Dave : Yeah, I get it. Finding balance is tricky but gotta keep things interesting. How dealing with pressure staying motivated? Calvin : started making music to follow my dreams stoked about how far I ' ve come. Collaborating with others learning from them keeps me motivated. Surrounding myself with positive energy passion helps. Dave : Sounds like great plan, Calvin! Surrounding yourself with good vibes collaborating with others give boost. achieved so much so far ; keep going, buddy! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Your support means a lot to me. keep pushing myself striving for my goals let ' s chat again soon. Dave : You got this! Keep pushing yourself never lose sight of your goals. I ' m your biggest fan. Let ' s chat soon! Calvin : Thanks, Dave! Appreciate your support. catch up soon and chat. Take care

Calvin : Hey Dave, long time no see! took my Ferrari for a service was stressful. m kinda attached to it. Can you relate? What kind of hobbies give you feeling of being restored? Dave : Hey Calvin, understand stress of getting a car serviced. Fixing cars is like therapy for me. Growing up working on cars with my dad, refurbishing them gives me sense of fulfillment. Dave : Hey Calvin, how ' s tour with Frank Ocean? pondering our chat other day about fame and impact on relationships. must be awesome but must have its own struggles too. Interacting like that cheers me up helps me stay informed - how about you? Plus keeps me motivated and inspired. Dave : Cool, Calvin! Art is amazing how it reflects the world. Has anything caught your eye lately made impact on your music? Calvin : Yeah, for sure! Recently inspired by struggles people go through. s made me dig deeper into my music to to capture those feelings. Dave : s cool. Using your music to share experiences and feelings, is it cathartic for you? Calvin : s way for me to express myself work through my emotions. s like my own form of therapy. Dave :, I get it. Cars give me outlet to express myself. s like little oasis of calm. Whenever working on one s like connecting back with myself.yeah, music helps too! Look at my garage, little dirty, but everything is in its place. Calvin : Looking cool - what made you start working on cars? Dave : Ever since ten, fascinated with how machines work. found old car in neighbor ' s garage asked if could fix it. ' s when my love for car engineering began! enjoyed transforming it from broken - down to high - running, sense of accomplishment made me hooked ve been working on cars ever since. Calvin : Impressive! must have taken lot of skill and determination to bring car back to life. Was it a classic car? still have it or currently working on another project? Dave : Thanks Calvin! fun project. restored a car last year, sold it to a collector. Now working on something new, s quite a challenge! Take look at this wonderful car! Calvin : Cool! Been wanting to try that. What say is toughest part of car restoration? Dave : It takes lot of patience, payoff is worth it. Paying extra attention to detail isn ' t easy, but it pays off. Calvin : details can make a difference. makes something great, like well - crafted rap song or sleek and stylish car. Dave : Yeah, for sure Calvin! Paying attention to details makes big difference, whether in music or with vehicles. Little things can make big impact! Calvin : Yeah, Dave! Paying attention to small details makes difference. Without them ' s just average. As artist, want to create something extraordinary! Dave : ' s great, Calvin! Loving attention to detail in work makes it extra special. Keep on creating! Calvin : Thanks Dave! Appreciate your support! Dave : Glad you like it, Cal! reminds me of good times at concerts last month. Music has way of connecting us and making memories. look at this picture, atmosphere was amazing! Calvin : Music has way of bringing us together creating unforgettable memories.It ' s unbeatable in terms of energy it brings. Dave : Yeah, for sure Calvin! Concerts are awesome, bring people together create cool vibe. can feel energy in air. look at unforgettable moment I captured at concert. Dave : Wow, s amazing how connection between artist and crowd can be indescribable. glad you get to experience that! Calvin : Wow, Dave! ' s rush connecting with everyone. feeling is unbeatable!
